moong_dal_khichdi.name: Moong Dal Khichdi
moong_dal_khichdi.method: Rinse dal and rice. Saute cumin and ginger in ghee, add turmeric, dal, rice and water. Simmer 20-25 minutes until soft. Garnish with coriander.
moong_dal_khichdi.notes: The classic tridoshic reset meal — light, easy to digest, and balancing for all three doshas.

warm_spiced_milk.name: Warm Spiced Milk (Vata-Kapha)
warm_spiced_milk.method: Warm milk gently with spices for 5 minutes, do not boil hard. Stir in a small spoon of ghee before serving.
warm_spiced_milk.notes: Grounding for vata, warming for kapha; best in cold weather.

cooling_cucumber_raita.name: Cooling Cucumber Raita
cooling_cucumber_raita.method: Mix grated cucumber into whisked yogurt, add chopped mint and cumin. Serve chilled.
cooling_cucumber_raita.notes: Cooling and hydrating — ideal for calming pitta heat in summer.

kapha_light_soup.name: Kapha-Light Vegetable Soup
kapha_light_soup.method: Saute ginger and pepper, add chopped vegetables and water, simmer until tender. Season with turmeric.
kapha_light_soup.notes: Light, warming, and stimulating — helps counter kapha heaviness and sluggish digestion.
